data.title: Guerra Wealth Advisors Invites South Florida Community to Join the St. Jude Walk Miami as a Champion Sponsor
data.description: On May 30, 2026, Guerra Wealth Advisors announced their participation in the 2026 St. Jude Walk Miami. They are extending the invitation to clients, friends, neighbors, and the South Florida community to join Team Guerra Wealth Advisors. The event aims to support the mission of St. Jude in providing hope and healing to children and families in need.

data.title: Senator Lummis warns China could control new financial rules if CLARITY Act doesn't pass. The Senate Banking Committee approved the Act in May, needing approval from both chambers.
data.description: In May, the Senate Banking Committee approved the CLARITY Act, which now requires approval from both houses of Congress before reaching the president for enactment.

data.title: $1.55 price prediction for TON faces $1.76 resistance, $1.71 support weak. Risk of 12% drop to $1.
data.description: Toncoin is currently trading at $1.76 and is under increasing pressure as its key support level of $1.71 is on the verge of breaking. Technical analysis suggests a possible 12% decline, with the next significant support at the 200-day moving average of $1.

data.title: SHIB eyes 20% breakout soon with RSI at 36.71, signaling potential 17-20% gains. Technical coiling pattern suggests momentum build-up.
data.description: Currently, SHIB's Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 36.71, indicating a momentum vacuum before potentially significant price movements. The MACD histogram shows zero signal, further supporting this trend. These technical indicators suggest a favorable setup for potential gains of 17-20% in the near future.

data.title: Worldcoin's price is expected to rally to $0.33 before dropping to $0.21. Smart money selling off continues.
data.description: The recent rebound of Worldcoin from the $0.28 support marks a potential shorting opportunity as it nears the $0.33 resistance level. This could lead to a projected decline to the $0.21 Bollinger lower band. The trend suggests ongoing smart money distribution, indicating a cautious approach among retail investors.

data.title: SUI Price Prediction: $0.86 support break looming, $1.00 rebound expected by mid-June as RSI weakens.
data.description: The technical breakdown of SUI is gaining momentum as it approaches the $0.86 Bollinger Band floor, while the weakening RSI suggests increased downside pressure. However, analysts anticipate a rapid rebound to $1.00 once the crucial support level at $0.86 is confirmed.

data.title: Price prediction: $0.15 in 7 days as whale buying increases. Smart money is bullish with 57.8% bias. $0.13 breakout targets $0.15 with 70% probability.
data.description: Although the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is currently neutral, institutional investors are showing a strong bullish sentiment with a bias of 57.8%. Options trading indicates a consolidation near the $0.12 support level. If the price breaches the $0.13 resistance level, the next target is set at $0.15 with a 70% probability of reaching that level.

data.title: Arbitrum expected to retest $0.08 before rallying 150% to $0.25. Currently trading at $0.10, setup indicates oversold conditions.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Arbitrum is currently trading at $0.10, experiencing oversold conditions as large investors known as whales are accumulating their holdings. Analysis of the technical setup suggests that the price may test the $0.08 support level before seeing a significant rebound towards $0.25. This rebound is expected to occur within the next 6-8 weeks.

This situation could lead to a 17% increase, bringing the value up to $1.10 in the next two weeks if market sentiment turns positive.

data.title: NEAR expected to surge to $2.80 soon, supported by key levels and technical indicators. Bullish momentum anticipated.
data.description: The technical analysis of NEAR indicates that the cryptocurrency is poised to rise to $2.80 in the short term as it remains above key moving averages. Momentum indicators also suggest a bullish trend at its current price levels. This potential increase to $2.80 could occur within the next few days.

This suggests a potential correction to a support level of $0.20 before aiming for $0.35. Market analysts indicate that smart money is currently maintaining a neutral position.

data.description: TRON is currently facing a crucial moment as bearish whales and negative funding rates are indicating a potential downward trend. There is a 65% chance that TRON may revisit the support level of $0.30 before experiencing any significant rally.

data.title: LDO price drops to $0.28 as support weakens, with $0.31 broken. Bearish trend persists despite smart money.
data.description: The LDO has dropped below a crucial support level of $0.31, with bearish momentum pushing towards the $0.28 mark. Despite smart money positioning, technical indicators suggest ongoing weakness in the market.

data.title: AdvisorVault Adds Social Media Archiving to its Consolidated D3P Service
data.description: AdvisorVault's latest offering, the Consolidated 17a-4, provides a new solution for Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs) and Broker-Dealers (BDs) to store and monitor social media communications securely. This update was released in Toronto on May 30, 2026. This tool offers RIAs and BDs an option to archive and supervise their social media activity, ensuring compliance with industry regulations. This update aims to enhance regulatory compliance and streamline the monitoring process for firms in the financial sector.

data.title: Tulsa's Route 66 Capital Cruise Sets GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS™ Mark
data.description: A new record was set in Tulsa, Oklahoma as 3,596 classic cars participated in the largest parade of its kind. The event took place on May 30, 2026, marking a historic moment for Tulsa, Route 66, and American history. This achievement was officially recognized by Guinness World Records at 11:52 a.m. on that Saturday.

data.title: $12.6M of USDC linked to privacy protocol Zama frozen by Circle, possibly due to civil court case, per ZachXBT.
data.description: ZachXBT, an onchain investigator, revealed that approximately $12.6 million in USDC was probably restricted due to its potential involvement in a separate civil court lawsuit.

data.title: AVAX price predicted to reach $12 in 8 weeks as smart money accumulates, with institutional traders long by 68%.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently holding at a price of $8.93, with institutional traders taking a long position of 68%. This positioning by institutional investors is creating a technical pattern that suggests a potential 35% increase towards $12 if the current support levels remain stable throughout the month of July.

data.title: DOT price expected to drop to $1.15 within a week. Currently trading 2.5% above $1.17 support with 65% chance of breaking down. RSI at 40, MACD shows zero momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot is currently trading at a mere 2.5% above the crucial support level of $1.17. Its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 40, indicating a neutral position, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows no momentum. There is a significant chance of a technical breakdown to $1.15, estimated at 65%, as derivative data points towards intense selling pressure in the market.

data.title: MATIC's price at $0.38 risks dropping to $0.31 as bulls retreat from defending $0.43. RSI at 38 and no MACD momentum signal a 65% chance of a technical breakdown.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently trading at $0.38, with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38 and no MACD momentum. It is nearing the $0.31 Bollinger Band support level, raising concerns of a potential technical breakdown with a 65% probability. An immediate recovery above this level is crucial to avoid further decline.
